hero.description: Multi-agent AI trading platform that analyzes markets, debates trade ideas, and lets you approve recommendations before execution.

features.title: Your AI Trading Agent
features.subtitle: Multi-agent architecture with human-in-the-loop approval for retail traders

ai.title: AI Analysis
ai.description: LLM-powered trade recommendations via Workers AI (free), OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or DeepSeek.

multiasset.title: Stocks & Crypto
multiasset.description: Trade stocks and crypto (24/7) through Alpaca with real-time portfolio tracking.

discussion.title: Discussion Feed
discussion.description: Real-time visibility into agent reasoning. Watch AI personas debate and analyze each trade idea.

approval.title: Trade Approval
approval.description: Every trade proposal requires your approval before execution. Review confidence scores, entry and exit targets.

risk.title: Risk Guardrails
risk.description: Position limits, daily loss caps, and configurable risk parameters built in.

performance.title: Performance Tracking
performance.description: Track trade outcomes, persona accuracy, and pattern extraction across all your trades.

byok.title: Bring Your Own Keys
byok.description: Use your own broker (Alpaca) and LLM API keys. Your capital, your control.

orchestration.title: Orchestration Modes
orchestration.description: Choose multi-persona debate (bull vs bear vs risk manager) or sequential pipeline analysis.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about notdemo.trade

beginner.label: Beginners
beginner.a1: It's a platform that runs multiple AI trading agents for you. These agents analyze technical indicators, debate trade ideas from different perspectives (bullish, bearish, risk), and present proposals for your approval. No trade executes without your say-so.

trader.label: Experienced Traders
trader.description: For traders familiar with TA and systematic trading.
trader.q1: I already do my own TA. Why would I need this?
trader.a1:
Three reasons:
1. **24/7 monitoring**: You can't watch 50 stocks across multiple timeframes constantly. The agents do — computing SMAs, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, and more.
2. **Multi-perspective analysis**: A debate mode pits bull, bear, and risk manager personas against each other. Pipeline mode runs sequential analysis. Both surface insights you might miss.
3. **Discipline**: Every recommendation comes with confidence scores, entry/exit targets, and position sizing. You approve or reject — no emotional trading.

Think of it as your TA, systematized and augmented with AI.

developer.label: Developers
developer.description: Technical deep-dive into architecture and stack.
developer.a1:
**Multi-agent edge-native stack**:

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  User Application (TanStack Start SSR)                  │
│  ├─ React + TanStack Router                             │
│  ├─ Server functions (createServerFn)                   │
│  └─ Deployed: Cloudflare Workers                        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                          ↓ HTTP/WebSocket
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Data Service (Hono REST API)                           │
│  ├─ Handlers → Services → Queries pattern               │
│  ├─ Zod validation, error handling                      │
│  └─ Deployed: Cloudflare Workers                        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                          ↓ RPC/WebSocket
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  SRP Agent Layer (Cloudflare Agents SDK)                │
│  ├─ Data Agents (market data fetching + caching)        │
│  ├─ Analysis Agents (TA indicators, LLM analysis)       │
│  ├─ Broker Agents (Alpaca trading interface)            │
│  ├─ Session Agent (AIChatAgent, real-time UI)           │
│  ├─ Orchestrators (Debate + Pipeline modes)             │
│  ├─ Workers AI + 5 LLM providers                        │
│  └─ Human-in-the-loop trade approval                    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                          ↓
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Data Layer (data-ops package)                          │
│  ├─ Drizzle ORM → Neon Postgres                         │
│  ├─ Zod schemas for validation                          │
│  ├─ Type-safe queries + Better Auth integration         │
│  └─ Shared across all services                          │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Key characteristics**:
- **Edge-first**: Everything runs on Cloudflare's edge network (low latency globally)
- **Multi-agent SRP**: Data, Analysis, Broker, and Orchestrator agents with single responsibility
- **Serverless**: No VMs to manage, infinite scaling
- **Multi-tenant**: Per-user isolation via Durable Objects
- **Free tier**: Workers AI (Llama 3.3 70B) requires no API key
